name: dietmcp
description: MCP-to-CLI bridge that reduces context window bloat by 92-94%. Routes all MCP server calls through lightweight bash commands instead of loading verbose JSON schemas into the agent's context. Supports tool discovery, skill summaries, TOON encoding, and formatted output with auto-redirect for large responses. Beats mcp2cli on token efficiency (16.3 vs 16 tokens/tool).
author: austindixson

tools.name: discover
tools.description: List configured MCP servers and their available tools with parameter info

params.server: Server name (optional, lists all if omitted)
params.refresh: Bypass cache and fetch fresh schemas

tools.name: exec
tools.description: Execute a tool on an MCP server and return formatted output

tools.name: skills
tools.description: Generate compact skill summaries that compress ~2000 tokens of JSON schema into ~200 tokens

tools.name: config
tools.description: Manage dietmcp configuration (init, show, path, add, remove servers)

params.subcommand: init, show, path, add, or remove
